trigger: 5th+ backbone validation per R46 next_probe spec

microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct.raw10_caveat: BASE-only; SFT (Phi-3-mini-instruct is the same checkpoint — already instruct-tuned; pretrain-only base unavailable) cannot test sign-flip falsifier F3

deepseek-ai/deepseek-llm-7b-base.raw10_caveat: BASE only; SFT (deepseek-llm-7b-chat) cannot fit cost cap

01-ai/Yi-6B.raw10_caveat: BASE only; SFT (Yi-6B-Chat) cannot fit cost cap; abs=10.75 sits at lower edge of >10 zone — Δ=0.75 from threshold (sensitivity untested)

n_7_unified_distribution.comment: All 3 new backbones in modifier zone (>10 abs). Zero new |BASE|<3 cases — primary zone hypothesis (P1 sign-flip prediction) UNTESTED by this cycle. Distribution remains modifier-skewed but with zero new primary-zone counter-falsifiers either.

verdict_rationale.promotion_to_R46_CONFIRMED: NOT MET — required at least one new |BASE|<3 backbone with predicted sign-flip; all 3 new backbones fell in modifier zone (>10). Zero direct test of R46's primary prediction P1.
verdict_rationale.deprecation_to_R46_DEPRECATED: NOT MET — no falsifier triggered: F1 (|BASE|<3 NEG that does NOT flip) untested; F2 (|BASE|>10 that flips) untestable without SFT measurement; F3 (POS-base flips to NEG) untestable without SFT measurement. Phi-3-mini & DeepSeek POS-base & Yi-6B |BASE|>10 all *consistent with* P2/P3 modifier predictions but do not actively confirm them either.
verdict_rationale.PARTIAL_evidence: Zone assignment of 3 new BASE-only measurements is internally consistent with R46 (no 5th–7th backbone fell into the gray-zone (3-10) where R46 predicts variance — though Llama at 5.09 was already gray-zone). The expected next-cycle work: dedicated |BASE|<3 backbone screen (e.g. small finetuned variants, smaller 1B-3B base models) to actively test P1.
verdict_rationale.epistemic_status: post-hoc threshold robustness improved marginally (3 new in-bin); generalization to N=7 remains statistically thin

predictions_status.P2_abs_gt_10_NEG_will_modifier_only: PARTIALLY consistent (Yi-6B base NEG -10.75; SFT comparison missing)
predictions_status.P3_POS_base_will_modifier_only: PARTIALLY consistent (Phi-3-mini +24.51, DeepSeek +27.78 both POS-base in bin; SFT comparison missing)

next_cycle_priorities: Recruit 2-3 backbones with predicted |BASE|<3 to actively test P1 (e.g. Pythia-1B/2.8B family, GPT-Neo small variants, TinyLlama)
If P1 sign-flip confirmed in 2/3 → R46_CONFIRMED
If P1 sign-flip falsified in 2/3 (F1 triggered) → R46_DEPRECATED
Optional: SFT instruct-pair forward for Yi-6B / DeepSeek to actively test F2/F3 (cost ~$0.50 per pair)
raw10_honest_caveats: BASE-only measurement cannot directly trigger F2/F3 — protocol limitation
All 3 new backbones happened to land in modifier zone (>10 or POS-base) — SAMPLING BIAS toward larger / more-trained models. R46 PRIMARY zone never sampled this cycle.
Yi-6B |BASE|=10.75 is 0.75 above threshold — extremely close to gray-zone upper edge; threshold is post-hoc fitted, ±2 sensitivity untested
Single-pod sequential measurement, no inter-backbone independence test (same pod, same env, same seed=42)

Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct is the only available 'mini' variant — there is no Phi-3-mini-base (it is delivered SFT-tuned). Treating it as 'BASE' is a definitional approximation; technically it is already an Instruct checkpoint. R46 zone assignment honest but classification of base/instruct is convention.
Yi-6B forward took 106.6s (vs <10s for Phi-3 / DeepSeek) — disk I/O dominant, not compute
torch downgrade from 2.11→2.6 cu124 was needed for sdpa cuDNN backend on H100 — methodology dependence on driver/runtime stack; reproducibility needs versions logged
environment: RunPod H100 80GB SXM 1x, secure cloud, sequential 3-bb forward
